title: Operationalize AI responsibly with Azure AI Foundry
summary: Explore Azure AI Foundry's tools for generative AI security, privacy, and quality. Shift from reactive risk management to agile, responsible-by-design governance for better observability and efficiency.

sections.title: Operationalize AI responsibly with Azure AI Foundry
sections.summary: Explore Azure AI Foundry's tools for generative AI security, privacy, and quality. Shift from reactive risk management to agile, responsible-by-design governance for better observability and efficiency.

lessons.title: Implement generative AI guardrails in Azure AI Foundry
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to choose and configure generative AI guardrails in Azure AI Foundry.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/moderate-content-detect-harm-azure-ai-content-safety-studio/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Measure and mitigate risks for a generative AI app in Azure AI Foundry
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to measure and mitigate risks for a generative AI app leveraging responsible AI tools and features within Azure AI Foundry.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/measure-mitigate-risks-azure-ai-studio/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Measure and mitigate risks for a generative AI app in Azure AI Foundry

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Operationalize AI responsibly with Azure AI Foundry
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Operationalize AI responsibly with Azure AI Foundry**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
